steps.title: Identify the text's progression
steps.content: The passage defines what community science is, explains its benefits, then provides a specific study as an example of this approach in practice.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: Choice C correctly identifies this structure—a particular approach is identified, its benefits are listed, and a study using the approach is mentioned. The other choices introduce elements absent from the passage (A mentions development and future projects; D mentions argumentation and public opinion) or mischaracterize the study's role (B places it as the main topic rather than an example). This matches choice C — C is correct.
